summary.intent: Fix 4 Codex third-pass findings in the image cropper component: aspect ratio mirroring to controlled slot, ordered zoom slider ARIA bounds, aria-disabled on root, and interaction baselines anchored to get() instead of pending().
summary.outcome: All 4 fixes implemented with TDD (failing tests first), 84 unit tests passing, clippy clean, spec synced, and round-3 fixes committed and pushed. Codex re-triggered for a fourth pass.

repo: The image cropper uses a dual-slot model: pending() holds un-acked internal state, get() holds the rendered/controlled value. Interactions must baseline off get(); callbacks report via on_crop_change(pending()).
enforce_aspect_ratio must mirror constrained values into the controlled slot so get() reflects the constraint immediately after SyncProps.
Snapshots require explicit re-acceptance after attribute additions (e.g., aria-disabled added to root_disabled snapshot).
cargo xci-fast is the pre-push gate; round-trip is: failing tests → fix → xci-fast green → commit/push → reply+resolve Codex threads → re-trigger.

code.finding: Line 754 is inside enforce_aspect_ratio and correctly reads pending() — it reads the just-set value. Only the four interaction snapshot reads (drag/resize/nudge/rotation) needed to switch to get().
Lines 1034/1074 are drag/resize baseline snapshots; 1135/1181 are SetRotation/NudgeCrop — all four switched from pending() to get() to anchor to rendered crop.

workflow: Write failing tests before implementing each fix to confirm the test actually catches the bug.
Codex review is done in passes; each pass may surface findings that are consequences of fixes from the previous pass.
Spec must be kept in sync with implementation: update both the behavior prose and the §3.1 ARIA attribute table when adding new ARIA attributes.

friction: Snapshots require a separate acceptance step after attribute changes, which is a manual interruption to the test cycle.
open_items: Codex fourth pass not yet complete — may surface additional findings from the round-3 controlled-mode changes.
PR threads for the 4 Codex findings need to be replied to and resolved after the push.
